title: Commodity Vocabulary Audit — Final Results

do_not_merge.geopolitical.json: Non-visual: sanctions, tariffs, trade wars — 190 phrases
do_not_merge.trading-culture.json: Finance jargon: trading floors, trader types — 125 phrases
do_not_merge.weather-commodity-links.json: Cross-reference data, not standalone phrases — 250 phrases
do_not_merge.absence-states.json: Too abstract: supply vacuum, depleted reserves — 220 phrases
do_not_merge.sensory-smell-taste.json: Non-visual sense: smell and taste — 100 phrases

what_was_removed.finance_jargon: margin, futures, trading, bull/bear, contango, arbitrage, etc.
what_was_removed.product_descriptions: battery production, dietary supplement, skincare ingredient

quality_decisions: KEPT: Industrial imagery — "molten gold streaming", "oil rig roughneck", "furnace glow orange"
KEPT: Worker stories — "weathered farmer hands cracked", "dust-covered face lined"
KEPT: Transformation processes — "smelting molten metal", "cherry ripening red purple"
KEPT: Real locations — "atacama salt flat evaporation ponds", "russian siberian tundra"
REMOVED: All finance jargon — futures, margins, portfolios, bull/bear markets
REMOVED: All 2-word generic labels — "clean energy", "heavy industry", "Asian staple"
REMOVED: All product descriptions — battery specs, food packaging, skincare ingredients
REMOVED: 6 entire files deemed non-visual or too finance-heavy
